subcodes.first_line: May the fragrances of God waft sweetly upon that luminous sepulchre, and may the breezes of God blow perfumed unto it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایا نفحات الله مری معطره لتلک الرمس الانور و ایا نسمات الله هبی معنبره الی
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @martyrs and martyrdom, @eulogies; reminiscences, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
